grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  GPS Solutions (2024) 28:26 https://doi.org/10.1007/s10291-023-01570-x ORIGINAL ARTICLE Performance assessment of the BDS‑3 PPP‑B2b service for real‑time earthquake source description: a case study for the 2021 Mw 7.4 Maduo earthquake Jianfei Zang1 · Shijie Fan1 · Caijun Xu2 · Zhicai Li3 · Rongxin Fang4 · Yidong Lou4 Received: 13 August 2023 / Accepted: 24 October 2023 © The Autho

In 2020, the third generation of the BeiDou Global Navigation Satel- lite System (BDS-3) initiated a real-time precise point positioning service through the B2b signal (PPP-B2b), which provides a new possibility for real-time earthquake source description.
